text: You wore a Game of Thrones shirt.

First take, right?
Let's do it.
We're Balyrian AI, and we raised $6 million
from Kleiner Perkins to bring AI to mortgage lending.
We get every loan to the finish line as fast as possible.
With Balyrian Loan Intelligence, loan officers
and underwriters no longer have to spend days manually
reworking loan files.
The moment a loan enters the loan origination system,
Balyrian Loan Intelligence immediately identifies key
gaps, such as missing documents, unsatisfied guidelines,
and complex income analyses, surfacing these along
with solutions to loan officers and underwriters
so they can focus time on high value decisions
and human relationships.
Balyrian is able to closely follow not only various
conforming regulations, such as Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac,
but also lender-specific non-QM rules and overlays
unlocking value through customization.
The nation's leading mortgage lenders like FM Home Loans
use Balyrian to ensure that loan officers and underwriters
are no longer tied up with expensive rework.
Instead, they're free to focus on decisions that actually
move deals forward.
That means materially lower origination costs,
faster time to close, and better borrower experiences,
all of which give lenders a durable competitive advantage
in a purchase-driven market.
We're Balyrian AI.
Loan Origination for the future.
